x-enumeration-literals.name: Status Update Transaction
x-enumeration-literals.description: An action that updates the current financial status of accounts, balances, or obligations.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Balance Reporting Transaction
x-enumeration-literals.description: An action that records or generates reports on current financial resources, exposures, or obligations.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Financial Adjustment Transaction
x-enumeration-literals.description: An action that modifies previously recorded status due to corrections, reconciliations, or updated information.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Reservation Transaction
x-enumeration-literals.description: An action that temporarily restricts or earmarks funds or assets, reflecting a change in financial availability.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Release Transaction
x-enumeration-literals.description: An action that removes holds or updates status to reflect funds or assets as available.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Alert Transaction
x-enumeration-literals.description: An action that flags anomalies or deviations in financial status requiring review or action.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Status Closure Transaction
x-enumeration-literals.description: An action that terminates tracking of a specific financial resource or obligation when it is settled or completed.
